label: Stars
summary: A display-only star rating: filled and empty pixel stars sized to the font.
era: The ★★★☆☆ verdict on every shareware download page, back when five stars meant something.

classes.name: rs-stars
classes.role: the star row, sized to the surrounding font

a11y: The glyph row is a single role="img" with an aria-label like "Rated 4 of 5 stars", readers get the number, not five star characters.
